div.p: Side-by-side comparison of sharding strategies for Y = XW

Technical Insight: Sequence of [TP-Col] -> [TP-Row] is optimal. The output of Column Parallelism is already sharded exactly as Row Parallelism requires for its input, meaning zero communication is needed between these two layers in a transformer block.

ul.li: Input X: Replicated on all GPUs
Comm: No communication in forward pass
Input X: Sharded [X1 | X2 | X3] (column slices of X)
Output Y: Requires All-Reduce to sum partial results
Comm: Partial sums must be aggregated
